message:
test(oracle): add 28 conformance tests (s441-s468) covering NATURAL JOIN, EXCEPT/INTERSECT, window NTILE/FIRST_VALUE/LAST_VALUE/NTH_VALUE, BETWEEN NULL edges, CAST edges, IIF/CASE, typeof/zeroblob/quote, GROUP_CONCAT, REPLACE INTO, total()/aggregates, compound LIMIT/OFFSET, INSERT...SELECT, scalar subqueries, hex/printf, HAVING multi-condition, multi ORDER BY, LEFT JOIN NULL, window ROWS/cumulative, DISTINCT, LIKE/GLOB, arithmetic overflow, UPDATE/DELETE subquery, recursive/non-recursive CTE, string functions, COALESCE/IFNULL, CROSS JOIN, window PARTITION BY

All 28 tests pass with 0 mismatches against C SQLite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
